eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Dolores, CO; at 11:34 AM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 12:34 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Evacuate NOW: Forest Service Private Land Inholdings North of Glade Ranch. Leave the area as soon as possible per Dolores County Sheriff
